name: Martin Lawrence
bio: Martin Fitzgerald Lawrence is an American comedian and actor who began in stand-up clubs in the Washington, D.C., area and at The Improv before hosting HBOs groundbreaking Def Comedy Jam for its first several seasons. He created and starred in the Fox sitcom Martin from 1992 to 1997 and built a major film career including the Bad Boys and Big Mommas House franchises. His 1994 hosting of Saturday Night Live, in which he made crude on-air remarks, resulted in a long-running ban from the show; he was also arrested in 1996 after a public episode that his representatives attributed to exhaustion.

timeline.ev: Lands first acting role on Whats Happening Now!!
Begins hosting HBOs Def Comedy Jam
Creates and stars in the Fox sitcom Martin
Releases the stand-up film You So Crazy

accolades: Host of HBOs Def Comedy Jam (first six seasons)
Creator and star of the sitcom Martin
